detectors.description:
Reentrancy in NITRO._transfer(address,address,uint256) (NITRO.sol#429-531):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (NITRO.sol#481)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (NITRO.sol#545)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (NITRO.sol#487)
		- communityWallet.transfer(amount) (NITRO.sol#553)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (NITRO.sol#529)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] += rTeam (NITRO.sol#619)
		- _rOwned[sender] -= rAmount (NITRO.sol#599)
		- _rOwned[recipient] += rTransferAmount (NITRO.sol#601)
	NITRO._rOwned (NITRO.sol#213) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- NITRO._takeTeam(uint256) (NITRO.sol#613-621)
	- NITRO._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (NITRO.sol#595-609)
	- NITRO.balanceOf(address) (NITRO.sol#325-329)
	- NITRO.constructor() (NITRO.sol#263-289)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (NITRO.sol#529)
		- _rTotal -= rFee (NITRO.sol#627)
	NITRO._rTotal (NITRO.sol#185) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- NITRO._getCurrentSupply() (NITRO.sol#693-703)
	- NITRO._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (NITRO.sol#625-631)
	- NITRO.constructor() (NITRO.sol#263-289)
	- NITRO.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (NITRO.sol#377-385)
